rationale: The cited paper is used in multiple functional places, not just a background list. In the theory section, it supports key premises about franchisors using complete and one-sided contracts and about disclosure reducing miscommunication, which feed into the citing paper's hypothesis logic. In the methods section, it is explicitly pointed to as a similar estimation approach and source of additional modeling detail. This indicates meaningful conceptual and methodological grounding.
relation_description: The citing paper relies on Kashyap et al. (2012) as prior governance evidence in franchising to motivate its agency-based framing of conflict and regulation effects. It also cites that paper as a methodological precedent for its recursive mixed-process estimation setup.
